title: senecio pinnatifolius var. maritimus
intro: Senecio pinnatifolius var. maritimus, also known as Maritime Ragwort or Maritimus Ragwort, is a variety of the Senecio pinnatifolius plant, a member of the daisy family. It is a perennial herb native to coastal regions of Europe, North Africa, and the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. In herbal preparations, Senecio pinnatifolius var. maritimus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to alleviate various health conditions, including liver and gallbladder issues, as well as to support digestion and relieve gastrointestinal discomfort.
